'''âh-n-r-l''' ('''kahanreloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impede|impede]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-r-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impede|impede]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-n-r-l
|-
! Lemma
| kahanreloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihanreloko|thihanreloko]] || [[word:jihanreloko|jihanreloko]] || [[word:shihanreloko|shihanreloko]] || [[word:kihanreloko|kihanreloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohanreloko|thohanreloko]] || [[word:johanreloko|johanreloko]] || [[word:shohanreloko|shohanreloko]] || [[word:kohanreloko|kohanreloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhanreloko|thĂŠhanreloko]] || [[word:jĂŠhanreloko|jĂŠhanreloko]] || [[word:shĂŠhanreloko|shĂŠhanreloko]] || [[word:kĂŠhanreloko|kĂŠhanreloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
